column1: # zap-rules.tsv - OWASP ZAP baseline scan rule overrides.
# Used by: docker run -t owasp/zap2docker-stable zap-baseline.py -t <url> -c zap-rules.tsv
# This is run as a DAST (Dynamic Application Security Testing) step against
# the deployed frontend/backend in a staging environment, ideally after
# every deploy to a non-prod EKS namespace, before promoting to prod.

column3: Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens - acceptable for this read/write demo API; would FAIL in a real prod gate
Timestamp Disclosure - low risk informational finding
